title: Semi-Centennial Celebration Of The New England Society New York, December 22, 1855
meaning:
Oliver Wendell Holmes's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Semi-Centennial Celebration Of The New England Society New York, December 22, 1855"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
